SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
articles.excerpt: Agent skills today are hand-crafted, generated one-shot, or evolved through loosely controlled self-revision, none of which behaves like a deep-learning optimizer for the skill, and none of which reliably improves over its starting point under feedback. We argue the skill should instead be trained as the external state of a frozen agent, with the same discipline that makes weight-space optimizatio
articles.summary: SkillOpt将agent技能视为冻结模型的外部状态，采用类似权重优化的方式训练，克服手工或松散自修正方法无法可靠改进的缺陷，使技能在反馈下持续提升，为自主agent技能进化提供了一种系统化优化框架。

articles.title: Geo-Align: Video Generation Alignment via Metric Geometry Reward
articles.excerpt: Camera-controlled video generation has achieved remarkable progress in recent years. However, existing video-to-video re-rendering methods primarily rely on Supervised Fine-Tuning using synthetic datasets. articles.summary: Geo-Align针对摄像机控制视频生成提出基于度量几何的奖励对齐方法，解决了合成数据微调泛化不足的问题，无需多视角真实视频即可实现更鲁棒的相机服从生成，提升跨域视频生成质量。

articles.title: From Raw Experience to Skill Consumption: A Systematic Study of Model-Generated Agent Skills
articles.excerpt: Language agents increasingly improve by reusing skills -- structured procedural artifacts distilled from past experience. In particular, domain-level and model-generated skills are especially promising. They offer fast adaptation within a domain by encoding domain-specific recurring procedures, and they scale beyond labor-intensive hand-crafting. However, while extraction methods continue to proli
articles.summary: 该工作系统研究了模型生成的领域级技能（skill）从原始经验提取到消费的全流程，分析了不同提取方法对技能质量和重用效率的影响，为语言agent通过技能快速适应新领域提供了设计指南。

articles.title: PhotoFlow: Agentic 3D Virtual Photography Missions
articles.excerpt: Virtual photography asks an agent to enter a prepared 3D scene with no preselected camera pose or reference image, infer a suitable shot from scene information and a language intent, choose executable camera parameters, and render the final photograph. Recent progress in vision-language models makes this kind of spatial agent increasingly plausible, but the task stresses two capabilities that rema
articles.summary: PhotoFlow利用视觉语言模型实现3D场景虚拟摄影：agent根据语言意图推断合适相机参数并渲染照片，无需预设位姿或参考图，将空间理解与可执行参数选择相结合，推动智能摄影代理发展。

articles.title: CoSPlay: Cooperative Self-Play at Test-Time with Self-Generated Code and Unit Test
articles.excerpt: Recently, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) and Test-Time Scaling (TTS) have advanced LLM code generation through executable verification. Yet Ground-Truth Unit Tests (GT UTs) remain a bottleneck: SOTA RLVR methods require them for costly training, while existing TTS methods lose competitiveness without them. This motivates GT-free TTS, where existing methods directly use self-
articles.summary: CoSPlay提出合作自对弈测试时扩展方法，使LLM代码生成无需真实单元测试即可自我改进，通过自生成代码与测试互相验证，在无GT约束下提升了生成代码的正确性，降低了RLVR训练成本。

articles.title: StepAudio 2.5 Technical Report
articles.excerpt: Unified audio-language modeling has emerged as a prominent trend in modern speech systems, promising to bring the reasoning capabilities of large language models to auditory tasks. However, existing unified foundations often struggle to match the depth of specialized systems across automatic speech recognition (ASR), text-to-speech synthesis (TTS), and realtime spoken interaction. Bridging this ga
articles.summary: StepAudio 2.5统一音频语言模型，在ASR、TTS和实时口语交互等任务上达到专用系统水平，通过联合训练弥合通用多模态与专用任务之间的性能差距，推进语音系统的通用基础建设。

articles.title: SCOPE: Simulating Cross-game Operations in Playable Environments for FPS World Models
articles.excerpt: Interactive world models for first-person shooter (FPS) games must resolve high-frequency overlapping control signals at every frame without disrupting unaffected regions. Existing methods inject actions globally and train on single titles, failing under dense FPS inputs. We observe that FPS actions are spatially selective: discrete events such as firing or reloading affect only a localized region
articles.summary: SCOPE针对FPS游戏世界模型提出空间选择性动作注入策略，仅影响局部区域，解决高频重叠控制信号下的全局干扰问题，并支持跨游戏操作模拟，为交互式FPS世界建模提供可扩展方案。

articles.title: MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems
articles.excerpt: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix.
